description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel hexagonal caseDial style: Silver dial with black and white coloured hands, black and steel coloured hour marks, branding above the 6 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang clasp, loops to hold the tail in place and holes to customise fitWater resistance: Up to 50 metres Warranty: 2 years warranty on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
